data.title: UK Regulators Draft New AML Rules for Crypto Firms

data.description:
World Liberty blacklists Justin Sun's wallet, locking 540 million tokens and addressing alleged market manipulation.

data.title: Analyst Speaks on Solana’s Stagnancy, Reveals the Altcoin Will Never Return to This Level
data.description:
Solana (SOL) might have underperformed by failing to meet expectations in August, but one analyst is convinced that SOL is primed for success.
source: https://zycrypto.com/analyst-speaks-on-solanas-stagnancy-reveals-the-altcoin-will-never-return-to-this-level/

data.title: Solana set a series of records in August, with $148M in app revenues
data.description:

source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/solana-set-a-series-of-records-in-august-with-148m-in-app-revenues/

data.title: A newly created wallet received 692 BTC from Galaxy Digital 1 hour ago
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, a newly created wallet received 692 BTC worth US$77.34 million from Galaxy Digital one hour ago.

data.title: Myriad Moves: Markets Flip Bearish on Bitcoin, and Can the Cowboys Upset the Eagles?

data.title: Justin Sun defends HTX while it lends 92% of its USDT on Aave

data.title: Pump.fun Frenzy, MemeCore Madness, Story’s Big Money – Altcoin Season Is Back
data.description:
Altcoin season is currently defined less by large caps and more by tokens with visible participation. Communities, launch platforms, and intellectual property are drawing volume and liquidity. That explains why MemeCore, Pump. fun, and Story have emerged as three of the more closely watched names this week. Each token represents a different route to activity. MemeCore continues […]
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/pumpfun-frenzy-memecore-surge-story-altcoin-season/

data.title: Trump hints that U.S. tariffs may replace income tax in the future, potentially changing tax policy
data.description: Market News: US President Trump hinted that tariffs may replace income tax in the future, which may change tax policy, and said that tariffs are "vital" to the success of the United States. (Jinshi)

data.title: Stripe and Paradigm incubate Tempo blockchain for stablecoin payments
data.description:
Private testnet aims to deliver low-cost settlement with partners including Visa, Deutsche Bank, and OpenAI
source: https://blockworks.co/news/stripe-and-paradigm-incubate-tempo

data.title: EasyA brings together Flare Networks and XRPL Commons at Havard
data.description:
In this plan: EasyA is hosting Flare Networks and XRPL Commons at Harvard on September 20-21. The EasyA and Flare Hackathon aims to partner with the Harvard Undergraduate Blockchain Club to showcase the future of cross-chain innovation. The event will include 200 top developers in a 36-hour hackathon to build the next generation of dApps […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/easya-brings-together-flare-networks-and-xrpl-commons-at-havard/

data.title: Aria Completes $15 Million in Seed and Strategic Rounds, Led by Polychain Capital and Others
data.description: Aria, an asset-on-chain platform based on the Story Protocol, announced the completion of a $15 million seed and strategic funding round, led by Polychain Capital and Neoclassic Capital, at a valuation of $50 million. Aria, which specializes in tokenizing music IP, has launched its first APL token, allowing holders to earn music copyright income through staking. (The Block)

data.title: Michael Saylor’s Strategy checks every box for S&P 500 inclusion with liquidity to match
data.description:
Michael Saylor’s Strategy Inc. has cleared every technical hurdle needed to enter the S&P 500, dragging nearly $70 billion worth of Bitcoin with it. According to Bloomberg, the company posted an unrealized gain of $14 billion last quarter, putting it firmly into the profit zone the index demands. That was the last missing piece for […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/strategy-checks-every-box-sp-500-inclusion/

data.title: Coinbase to List Awe (AWE)
data.description: Coinbase has announced support for AWE (AWE) on the Base network. Please do not send this asset over other networks, as this may result in loss of funds. Trading will begin on or after 9:00 AM PT on September 4, 2025, subject to liquidity conditions. Trading of the AWE-USD pair will launch in phases and may be restricted in some regions.

data.title: SEC Goes All In on Pro-Crypto Agenda With Slew of Digital Asset Rulemakings
data.description:
Nearly half of the regulator’s new slate of proposed rules focus squarely on loosening regulations on the crypto industry.
source: https://decrypt.co/338116/sec-goes-all-pro-crypto-agenda-digital-asset-rulemakings
